audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L103 ensures msg.sender == s_auction before any further execution; msg.sender is transaction-level and cannot change between L103 and L111. The amountOut parameter is immutable calldata, so _multiCall cannot alter it. forceApprove(msg.sender, amountOut) at L111 is unconditionally executed after _multiCall, always setting the exact allowance regardless of what _multiCall did.
